ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the location (e.g., North, South, East, West) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "urbanization_rate" REAL /* Urbanization rate of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic group */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the demographic group (1 = male, 2 = female) */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the demographic group (e.g., 0-14, 15-24, 25-34) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the demographic group (e.g., primary, secondary, tertiary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "causes_of_death" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause of death */,
  "cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the cause of death */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the cause of death (e.g., infectious, non-infectious) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortality_rates" (
  "mortality_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortality rate */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic group */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cause of death */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the mortality rate */,
  "dalys_rate" REAL /* DALYs rate for the given demographic group and cause of death */,
  "crude_death_rate" REAL /* Crude death rate for the given demographic group and cause of death */,
  "age_adjusted_death_rate" REAL /* Age-adjusted death rate for the given demographic group and cause of death */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mortality_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_rates_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_rates_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_rates_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_rates_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_id") REFERENCES causes_of_death ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Actual year of the mortality rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the mortality rate */,
  "mortality_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mortality rate being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the mortality rate was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the mortality rate was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_mortality_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("mortality_rate_id") REFERENCES mortality_rates ("mortality_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government report, research study) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortality_rate_sources" (
  "mortality_rate_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortality rate source */,
  "mortality_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mortality rate */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mortality_rate_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_rate_sources_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_rate_sources_mortality_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("mortality_rate_id") REFERENCES mortality_rates ("mortality_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_topics" (
  "research_topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research topic */,
  "research_topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the research topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_topics" (
  "user_topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user topic */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "research_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_topics_research_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_topic_id") REFERENCES research_topics ("research_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_topics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
